# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: gcp-service-account
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
  properties:
    accountId: application-service-account
    displayName: Application service account
    projectId: project-id

- name: gcp-service-account-key
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccounts.key
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
      - gcp-service-account
  properties:
    parent: projects/project-id/serviceAccounts/application-service-account@project-id.iam.gserviceaccount.com

- name: gcp-api-access-role
  type: iam.v1.setIamPolicy
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
      - gcp-service-account
  properties:
    resource: projects/project-id/serviceAccounts/application-service-account@project-id.iam.gserviceaccount.com
    policy:
      bindings:
        - role: roles/editor
          members:
            - serviceAccount:application-service-account@project-id.iam.gserviceaccount.com
